BUILD IT TOGETHER
# EMBEDDED EXPERTS
We're not a consulting shop. Our experts embed directly in your team, solving problems alongside you, transferring knowledge as we go, and leaving you stronger than we found you.
[Talk to an Expert](https://strangeworks.com/contact)
[Start with a Fixed Project](https://strangeworks.com/launchpad)
HOW WE WORK TOGETHER
## Integrated, not outsourced.
There's a reason the best software companies use forward-deployed engineers. When experts work inside your organization (not in a silo somewhere else), you get better solutions and a team that can maintain them.
## We work alongside you
Our experts join your team's rituals: standups, planning sessions, code reviews. We're not observers; we're collaborators building solutions together.
## Knowledge transfers naturally
When you work side-by-side, learning happens automatically. Your team builds real capability through real work, not classroom training.
## You own the outcome
We don't hand you a black box. Everything we build, your team understands. When we leave, you can run it, improve it, and extend it.
## Self-sufficiency is the goal
We succeed when you don't need us anymore. Our goal is to make your team capable of doing this work independently.
WHAT WE WORK ON
## Complex problems that matter.
Our engagements typically fall into two categories: solving optimization problems that drive immediate business value, and preparing organizations for quantum computing. Often, both happen in parallel.
## Optimization Problems
Immediate business impact through advanced compute
  * Supply chain optimization
Inventory, routing, network design
  * Workforce scheduling
Shift planning, crew scheduling, resource allocation
  * Portfolio optimization
Asset allocation, risk management
  * Manufacturing operations
Production planning, energy efficiency


## Quantum Readiness
Preparing your organization for the quantum future
  * Use case identification
Finding where quantum creates competitive advantage
  * Team enablement
Building internal quantum expertise
  * Strategy development
Roadmaps for quantum adoption
  * Innovation lab setup
Establishing experimentation practices


TRACK RECORD
## Results that lead to more work.
Almost every engagement we've done has led to requests for additional projects. When we deliver, customers want more.
80%+
of engagements lead to follow-on work
15+
years in quantum and optimization
40+
technology partners in our network
THE RIGHT FIT
## This isn't for everyone.
Forward Deployed Experts is a premium engagement. It's for organizations with complex problems and the commitment to solve them properly.
### This is right for you if:
  * You have identified problems that need deep expertise
  * You want to build internal capability, not just get a deliverable
  * You're ready for a meaningful investment
  * You need production-grade solutions, not just a PoC


### Want a defined scope?
[Launchpad](https://strangeworks.com/launchpad) is a fixed-scope, fixed-budget engagement. Great if you want to prove out an idea, need something that fits a specific budget, or aren't sure exactly where to start.
Many teams use Launchpad to build confidence before expanding into a broader engagement. Others use it as a standalone project. Either works.
[Learn about Launchpad](https://strangeworks.com/launchpad)
![Launchpad](https://strangeworks.com/images/headers/services/launchpad-pink.png)
![](https://strangeworks.com/images/global/footer-xray.png)
## Let's talk about your problem.
Tell us what you're trying to solve. We'll be honest about whether we're the right fit. And if we're not, we'll point you in the right direction.
[Talk to an Expert](https://strangeworks.com/contact)
[What is Heterogeneous Hybrid Compute?](https://strangeworks.com/heterogeneous-hybrid-compute)
[What Can Quantum Do Today?](https://strangeworks.com/quantum-computing)

html:
BUILD IT TOGETHER

EMBEDDED EXPERTS

We're not a consulting shop. Our experts embed directly in your team, solving problems alongside you, transferring knowledge as we go, and leaving you stronger than we found you.

Talk to an Expert
Start with a Fixed Project

HOW WE WORK TOGETHER

Integrated, not outsourced.

There's a reason the best software companies use forward-deployed engineers. When experts work inside your organization (not in a silo somewhere else), you get better solutions and a team that can maintain them.

We work alongside you

Our experts join your team's rituals: standups, planning sessions, code reviews. We're not observers; we're collaborators building solutions together.

Knowledge transfers naturally

When you work side-by-side, learning happens automatically. Your team builds real capability through real work, not classroom training.

You own the outcome

We don't hand you a black box. Everything we build, your team understands. When we leave, you can run it, improve it, and extend it.

Self-sufficiency is the goal

We succeed when you don't need us anymore. Our goal is to make your team capable of doing this work independently.

WHAT WE WORK ON

Complex problems that matter.

Our engagements typically fall into two categories: solving optimization problems that drive immediate business value, and preparing organizations for quantum computing. Often, both happen in parallel.

Optimization Problems

Immediate business impact through advanced compute

  • Supply chain optimization

    Inventory, routing, network design

  • Workforce scheduling

    Shift planning, crew scheduling, resource allocation

  • Portfolio optimization

    Asset allocation, risk management

  • Manufacturing operations

    Production planning, energy efficiency

Quantum Readiness

Preparing your organization for the quantum future

  • Use case identification

    Finding where quantum creates competitive advantage

  • Team enablement

    Building internal quantum expertise

  • Strategy development

    Roadmaps for quantum adoption

  • Innovation lab setup

    Establishing experimentation practices

TRACK RECORD

Results that lead to more work.

Almost every engagement we've done has led to requests for additional projects. When we deliver, customers want more.

80%+

of engagements lead to follow-on work

15+

years in quantum and optimization

40+

technology partners in our network

THE RIGHT FIT

This isn't for everyone.

Forward Deployed Experts is a premium engagement. It's for organizations with complex problems and the commitment to solve them properly.

This is right for you if:

  • You have identified problems that need deep expertise
  • You want to build internal capability, not just get a deliverable
  • You're ready for a meaningful investment
  • You need production-grade solutions, not just a PoC

Want a defined scope?

Launchpad is a fixed-scope, fixed-budget engagement. Great if you want to prove out an idea, need something that fits a specific budget, or aren't sure exactly where to start.

Many teams use Launchpad to build confidence before expanding into a broader engagement. Others use it as a standalone project. Either works.

Learn about Launchpad

Let's talk about your problem.

Tell us what you're trying to solve. We'll be honest about whether we're the right fit. And if we're not, we'll point you in the right direction.
